subcodes.first_line: O peoples of creation! The Lord of Names maketh mention of you from this Prison wherein hath been established the throne of your Lord, the Most High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل الانشاء یذکرکم مولی الاسماء فیهذا السجن الذی استقر فیه عرش ربکم العلی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Greatest Name, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
